description: 1. Guaranteed antibacterial treatment HYGIOTECH 2. Classical cut, supple fabric that follows movements, cotton feel3. Resistance to wear and tear, long lasting, keeps its shape4. Equarea technology for quick moisture transferComposed of 100% polyester, these t-shirts provide extra comfort during any sport activity or otherwise, as it does not soak up too much of the perspiration. Known for its comfort feel, it is an all-purpose t-shirt for men from all walks of life. There is never been a more a popular wear than a t-shirt. A t-shirt offers unbelievable comfort and is extremely easy to put on. They are ideal for wearing at home, office or to parties. Its the consummate casual wear that people cant do without. There are a whole range of t-shirts that come in various shapes, sizes and fits. T-shirts are also available in lots of colours for men. Team up the t-shirt with absolutely anything and it will still look good and feel good. The beauty of t-shirts lies in its simplicity and it continues to win admirers with every passing day. Get into a t-shirt and experience freedom.   Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in T-shirts2. Height-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
